stories.headline: Four in hospital after bare-chested man with weapon roams around Edinburgh
stories.description: A man was seen battering the door of a pizzeria as members of the public run away on Friday night.

stories.headline: German journalist held in Syria back home, family says
stories.description: Eva Maria Michelmann’s brother says she had been held in the Syrian city of Raqqa since January.

stories.headline: Scotland v Morocco: Flawed but relentless Scotland show themselves as men of substance
stories.description: Morocco threatened to blow Scotland away early on, but Steve Clarke's squad showed their resilience ...

stories.headline: Moscow oil refinery attack brings Russia's war with Ukraine closer to home
stories.description: There are moments when life in Moscow feels completely normal - Thursday morning wasn't one of them,...

stories.headline: Crocodile attack on boy at Cambridgeshire zoo: What do we know?
stories.description: A 30-year-old man is bailed after a child ended up in a crocodile enclosure at a farm zoo.
